sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n211" key="a)brw/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀ-βρώς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not devoured</tr_>; hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not bitten</tr_> by mosquitoes, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.764</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
